programme.title: Emergency Call
programme.desc: Across a 12-hour shift, we follow the unsung heroes - the call takers, who are the first point of call in an emergency and can often make the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Yummy Mummies
programme.desc: Maria celebrates her baby shower, with the Melbourne Yummy Mummies in attendance.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger In 10 Days
programme.desc: Cherry Healey and the team help Sarah, an exhausted single mum with six kids and no time for herself. They also assist Steve, an ex-gambling addict whose life has taken some very dark turns.

programme.title: Instant Hotel
programme.desc: The couples head to Melbourne to stay at Serena and Sturt's instant hotel. Frustration builds when guests discover they are staying in an outer suburb 40 minutes' drive from the city.

programme.title: Dancing With The Stars
programme.desc: Our second group of Dancing Stars enter the ballroom for 2025 including comedians Shuan Micallef and Felicity Ward as well as television and radio host Osher Gunsberg.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: In this fully animated, all-new take on the Smurfs, a mysterious map sets Smurfette and her best friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on an exciting and thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest filled with magical creatures to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does. Embarking on a roller coaster journey full of action and danger, the Smurfs are on a course that leads to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history!

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: Music superstars Kat Valdez and Bastian are getting married before a global audience of fans. But when Kat learns that Bastian has been unfaithful, she instead decides to marry a stranger in the crowd.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. Planning to propose at her family's annual Christmas dinner - until you realize that they don't even know she's gay - is even harder. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew. HAPPIEST SEASON is a holiday romantic comedy that hilariously captures the range of emotions tied to wanting your family's acceptance, being true to yourself, and trying not to ruin Christmas.

programme.title: 5th Ave Girl
programme.desc: The life of a malcontent New York millionaire is changed forever when he heads out of his office for the day and meets a lovely homeless woman, who he decides to take into his home so she can help celebrate his birthday.

programme.title: TBA
programme.desc: TBA.

programme.title: TBA
programme.desc: TBA.

programme.title: Against The Wall
programme.desc: Abby gets the chance to work with one of her heroes when she and Lina try to uncover a mob mole.

programme.title: Against The Wall
programme.sub-title: We Have A Cop In Trouble Here
programme.desc: Abby and Lina investigate an ex-con who's accusing police officers of harassment. Meanwhile, Abby faces her own harassment at work when the I.A. detective covering Richie's case propositions her.

programme.title: Against The Wall
programme.desc: Abby and Lina investigate improprieties at the coroner's office when a woman's corpse goes missing but turns up in a twisted comedic video that goes viral online.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: The team visits Sydney Fish Market for an early morning seafood challenge.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules New Zealand
programme.desc: After the elimination of Travis and Jeremy and Lauren and Simon in the previous sudden death cook-off, just five teams remain.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules New Zealand
programme.desc: It's the first semi-final, and the remaining contestants must cook their best three courses to make it to the grand-final.

programme.title: Jabba's Movies
programme.desc: Jabba presents his best movies to see in Autumn featuring Michael, The Devil Wears Prada 2, The Sheep Detectives, Star Wars: The Mandalorian & Grogu, plus previews the hottest flicks coming in Winter.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Remi seizes the day. Sonny surprises John. Mali's moving on.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Witnessing her reservations about Abigail's plans for the hen's party later, Cash tells Eden he's glad Tane's organising his buck's.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Wandering through the Bay, Sonny admits to Remi he's disappointed the buck's party isn't going to be at the whisky bar any more.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Will Alf accept help from his friends? Tane's loved ones cling to hope. Sonny's feeling sidelined. David wishes he did better.

programme.title: Sean's Kitchen
programme.desc: Follow Sean Connolly, one of Australia's most well-respected and celebrated chefs, in his bid to showcase outstanding South Australian produce in his new restaurant named Sean's Kitchen.

programme.title: Sean's Kitchen
programme.desc: Follow Sean Connolly, one of Australia's most well-respected and celebrated chefs, in his bid to showcase outstanding South Australian produce in his new restaurant named Sean's Kitchen.

programme.title: A Moveable Feast
programme.desc: Melbourne's king of breakfast radio 3AW's Ross Stevenson explores Altona and Werribee to find the best kept secrets, eating spots and things to do with his co-host Kate Stevenson.

programme.title: Animals Aboard With Dr. Harry
programme.desc: We hit the road to save man’s best friend. A teary farewell for a special needs pup. A race against time to move the world’s most dangerous bird. And two French bull dogs take a 4300km road trip.

programme.title: Behave Yourself
programme.desc: Darren McMullen presents a mix of quick-fire buzzer rounds, experiments and hidden camera stunts to celebrity panellists as they compete to reveal fascinating facts behind why we do the things we do.

programme.title: Puppy School
programme.desc: Dog Squad Puppy School Series 3 kicks off with mobility fluff balls on the loose, you have to be quick if you want to catch Police pup Uber, and we’ve got a snow dog!

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall trains a German shepherd anxious about her puppy, a bulldog that is always stealing food and faces a particular challenge with a picnic, and a boxer that is driving a wedge between its owners.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The death of an officer pulls Goren from his compassionate leave as the case is given top priority, but his relentless investigation brings out information which leads to catastrophic fallout.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: While Benson tries to help the young BX9 gang member who attacked her, Duarte reveals a shocking piece of evidence in the case. Fin is tasked with hiring new detectives for the Bronx SVU.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As Benson and Carisi put a vengeful crime boss on trial, Fin tries to help a woman who was drugged and left for dead. Velasco takes drastic action to get information from a witness.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: A severe blizzard causes a city-wide blackout, adding to the obstacles the team must overcome in order to solve a murder case that could be linked to a potential viral outbreak.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Pairs of dismembered feet wash ashore after floods on the US-Canada border, some of which are research corpses. A pair of rare and expensive sneakers provide a lead to the murderer.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: When a beloved Paniolo (Hawaiian cowboy) is shot while out riding his horse, Jane and her team must gain the trust of the Paniolo community to help find the culprits and protect the Paniolo’s life.

programme.title: NCIS: Hawai'i
programme.desc: When a Japanese sailor is killed on American soil and evidence links the case to the previous murder of the victim's girlfriend back in Japan, NCIS must find the murderer before the wrong person is accused and the case triggers a diplomatic crisis. Also, Captain Milius makes a personal request to Tennant.

programme.title: Girlfriends' Guide To Divorce
programme.sub-title: Rule #188 - Mind Your Side Of The Pl
programme.desc: Abby joins Barbara for a night out on the town. Jo deals with the ramifications of Scott’s departure. While Phoebe and JD try to bond with her kids, Delia deals with her troublesome new client.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Claudia Joy and Chandler try to help an army wife who is being threatened with deportation. Roxy figures out a way to cut construction costs and move forward with building the truck stop.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Claudia Joy and Chandler continue on the case of an army wife being threatened with deportation. Pamela notices Finn and TJ have gotten close to Whit.

programme.title: Army Wives
programme.desc: Despite the sadness that she feels, Denise finds the strength to be there for Jeremy's friends when they need her most. Things are tense between Roxy and Trevor as she struggles to find a way to tell him about the truck stop.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining game show where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: The team uncovers animal secrets, including turtles, while Guy goes undercover in a canine operation.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: Nathan explores solids, liquids, and gases, learning about states of matter from various experts.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A new game show for kids where knowledge meets strategy with hilarious, slimy fun.

programme.desc: TBA.

programme.title: TBA
programme.desc: TBA.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.sub-title: Great Day Out, The S3 Ep: 31
programme.desc: Billy gets a taste of Moreton Bay. Luke meets some emerging artists. Laurel takes high tea with Aussie film royalty, while Jillian visits some seriously glam places to stay on the Gold Coast.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: The ladies get their first taste of life out on the land and are in for the shock of their lives. A text will send shockwaves across the farms leading to sudden departures.

programme.title: My France With Manu
programme.desc: Manu returns to take us on another journey through his home country, exploring the streets of Paris - its delights, and even learning the cancan.

programme.title: My France With Manu
programme.desc: Manu is back in France, taking you to Pyrenees, the place where garlic meets chilli, where France meets Spain. Explore a land of medieval castles where knights battled and ladies hit their mark.
